title: Vietnamese Crispy Floral Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy dessert made with floral ingredients, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine floral and crumbly ingredients.
2. Add the vietnamese rice flour, coconut milk, and stir-fry oil.
3. Mix well until a dough forms.
4. Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
5. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown and crispy.
7. Remove from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
